title: COOPERATIVE ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 27.  COOPERATIVE ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§9020.  Short Title

This Chapter may be referred to as the "Cooperative Economic Development Law."

Added by Acts 1978, No. 617, §1.
